text:

Hiring Scorecard — Sarah Chen
Structured evaluation sheet for the Senior ML Engineer hiring workflow.
Document ID
HR-003

Talent Acquisition
Candidate
Sarah Chen

Senior ML Engineer
Review Date
2024-03-15
Synthetic corporate document for demo, evaluation, and retrieval workflows only. All parties, people, systems, repositories, and events are
fictional.
Score Summary
Dimension

Evidence
LLM / transformer expertise

optimization, and conference publications.

and MLOps automation.
Technical leadership
15
4 / 5

Led a five-person ML pod and mentored
junior engineers.
RAG / retrieval depth
15
3 / 5
9
Strong adjacent skills; direct retrieval-system
evidence limited in CV.
Compliance / governance awareness
10
2 / 5
4
No direct SOC2 / HIPAA ownership shown.
Edge / on-prem deployment
10
2 / 5
4
Mostly cloud-native deployments.
Cross-functional collaboration
10
4 / 5
8
Repeated evidence of product and research
collaboration.
Overall recommendation: 87 / 100 — Strong Hire. Advance to final technical interview with emphasis on
RAG architecture and regulated-workload instincts.
Decision Signals
●
Meets all three must-have areas already evidenced in the CV: LLM expertise, large-scale production ML, and
technical/team leadership.
●
Primary gaps are specific to retrieval architecture and regulated workload exposure, both considered trainable if
fundamentals are strong.
●
No blocking risk was found in communication, ownership, or seniority signals.
